name: rio-deck
description: Rio — customer pitch deck (Marp). 10-minute, multi-prospect webinar.

scripts.build: npm run html && npm run pdf
scripts.site: marp slides.md -o _site/index.html --html --theme-set theme/rio.css --allow-local-files && marp slides.vi.md -o _site/vi.html --html --theme-set theme/rio.css --allow-local-files && marp slides.ko.md -o _site/ko.html --html --theme-set theme/rio.css --allow-local-files && cp -r assets _site/assets
